_meta.purpose: SoT for T4 phase-time-gated brand-overlay + verify
_meta.ground_truth_source: Frame-samples extracted at every 2s 0-50 + 55-175, boundary samples at 12/14/85/88/91/93/152/156/175

phases.description: Dashboard akt-1 mit case-list, KPIs 3/6/21, Greeting 'Guten Morgen, Dörfler'
Case-Detail Leck, Status Neu→Wählen, Termin-Picker, Gunnar Wende contact, Case-Pill DA-0050
Case-Detail + Phone PiP SMS notification (brief, ~1-2s). phone_pip element removed — too brief to overlay reliably.
Case-Detail status In-Arbeit→Erledigt, Bewertung anfragen button
Case-Detail Bewertung angefragt — KEIN Phone PiP yet, only sidebar/pill/contact.
Phone PiP review-screen visible with Dörfler AG header — overlay tenant name.
Full-screen Loom-Face transition (black background, no UI)
Dashboard updated KPI 2/6/22/4.7, case-list with updated case (Stefan Fischer ergänzt)
Full-screen Loom-Face closing segment (black background, no UI)

sidebar_logo._note: Top-left of sidebar. Dörfler shows DA-round-badge + 'Dörfler AG' text + 'Leitsystem' subtitle. Pixel-measured native 1440x900: badge x=14-50, text x=58-138, total y=14-70.

greeting._note: Dashboard top, 'Guten Morgen, Dörfler' — large heading. Pixel-measured native: x≈180, y≈50, large font ≈30px. Cover with 'Guten Tag, {tenant_short}'.

case_pill._note: Top-right of case-detail header, 'DA-0050' dark pill. Pixel-measured: x=1320, y=42, w=100, h=36.

case_list._note: Dashboard case-list rows. KPI cards end at ~y=220. Cover from y=240 down. Fully opaque to hide all rows.
case_list.text_template: Demo-Daten — in Ihrer Installation sehen Sie Ihre echten Fälle

contact_panel._note: Case-detail KONTAKT panel at right column, BELOW ÜBERSICHT row. KONTAKT label at y=310, content (Gunnar Wende name+phone+email+address) at y=340-460. Cover content only.

phone_sms_sender._note: Phone PiP at t=28-40s, SMS notification toast. Tenant name shown on toast header. Pixel-measured native.

phone_review_header._note: Phone PiP at t=60-86s, large blue tenant-name header on review-screen. Pixel-measured: x=880-1080, y=260-310 in native 1440x900.

sidebar:tenant_name._note: Top-right corner of sidebar drawbox (x=6-162, y=12-76). Sample at x=155, y=15 → dark blue bg, away from white text.

sidebar:hidden._note: Top-left corner during loom-only. Master fades dashboard out → background varies. Threshold relaxed (loom face is centered, but glow + transition extends).

case_pill:tenant_prefix._note: Top-left corner of case-pill drawbox (x=1314-1426, y=38-80). Sample at x=1320, y=42 → dark bg, away from white text.

case_pill:hidden._note: Loom-only — master transition has variable brightness at edges. Threshold relaxed.

greeting:tenant_short._note: Top-right corner of greeting drawbox (x=178-598, y=46-90). Sample at x=580, y=50 → white bg, ALWAYS away from text regardless of tenant-name length.

greeting:hidden._note: Loom-only — master content at this position is unreliable (transition fade-in). Threshold relaxed.

contact:hidden_or_anonymized._note: Center of contact_panel overlay drawbox (x=870-1365, y=340-485 → center 1117, 412). White bg.

case_list:hidden_or_anonymized._note: Center of case_list overlay drawbox (x=168-1423, y=240-885 → center 795, 562). White bg.

phone_sender:tenant_name._note: Center of phone_sms_sender region — currently not overlaid (out of V2 scope).

phone_review_header:tenant_name._note: TOP edge of phone_review drawbox above text baseline. Probe at y=254 — text starts y=264. White-bg padding area, length-independent.
